g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the run() method signature look like for a DfX check?')
sendPrompt('What fields should a DfX CheckResult dataclass contain?')
sendPrompt('How should severity levels be encoded in DfX check results?')
sendPrompt('Show me a concrete implementation of WallThicknessCheck using trimesh ray casting')
sendPrompt('Show me a DraftAngleCheck implementation using OCCT face normals')
sendPrompt('Show me a HoleRatioCheck using OCCT cylindrical face queries')
sendPrompt('How should I implement a rule registry that maps check names to DfxCheck classes?')
sendPrompt('How should manufacturing parameters and thresholds be stored and passed to checks?')
sendPrompt('How should DfX check results be collected and aggregated across all checks?')
